title: psychotria andetrensis
intro: Psychotria andetrensis, also known as Ande's wild coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of South America, and its leaves contain caffeine and other xanthines, giving it similar properties to coffee. The medicinal properties of Psychotria andetrensis include its ability to stimulate the central nervous system, increase alertness, and have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of consuming this plant include improved cognitive function, increased energy, and potential anti-aging properties, and it is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused into coffee substitutes.
